steps.title: Use the conversion factor
steps.content:
To convert radians to degrees, multiply by:
$$\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}$$

steps.title: Convert the given expression
steps.content:
Multiply the radian measure by the conversion factor:
$$-\frac{7}{12}\pi\cdot\frac{180^\circ}{\pi}$$
This expression keeps the sign and cancels radians.

steps.title: Match the expression
steps.content: The converted expression is the one shown in choice C. The answer is C.
